summary: P1 Production Infrastructure features tested successfully. All 15 backend tests pass (including rate-limited one after retry). Frontend: Login, Dashboard, Security Settings, and Transaction Room all work correctly. WebSocket real-time status indicator shows 'Live' with online users count.

minor.issue: Rate limiting kicks in after multiple rapid login attempts (429) - this is expected behavior for security

critical_code_review_comments: Good: Background Jobs API (/api/jobs/) returns empty jobs list initially, tracks jobs when created
Good: File serving endpoint (/api/documents/files/) correctly returns 404 for nonexistent files
Good: WebSocket endpoint (/api/transactions/{id}/ws) exists and doesn't crash on HTTP requests
Good: WebSocket status indicator in TransactionRoom shows 'Live' (green) when connected
Good: Online users indicator shows user count in real-time
Good: Task manager singleton tracks job status (pending, running, completed, failed)
Good: Email service creates tracked background jobs for email sending
Good: Database indexes created on startup for performance
Good: PDFPreview component uses react-pdf v10.4.0 with pdfjs-dist v5.4.296
Good: Security Settings page renders 2FA status card and Enable 2FA button correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login, Dashboard with Security button, Security Settings with 2FA, Transaction Room with WebSocket status)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing TEST_Admin Transaction
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) P1 features tested: Background Jobs API, WebSocket real-time for Transaction Room, PDF Preview component, File Serving endpoint. 2) Transaction Room at /transactions/{id} shows WebSocket 'Live' status and online users. 3) PDFPreview component is integrated (uses react-pdf v10.4.0). 4) Jobs API tracks email sending and other background tasks. 5) Security Settings at /settings/security works with 2FA enable/disable. 6) Rate limiting is active on auth endpoints (10/minute).

p1_websocket.online_users: WORKING - Shows count of online users

p1_file_serving.GET /api/documents/files/{filename}: WORKING - Returns 404 for nonexistent, requires auth

p1_pdf_preview.PDFPreview component: BUILT - Uses react-pdf v10.4.0 with pdfjs-dist v5.4.296

frontend_pages.transaction_room: WORKING - WebSocket status (Live/Offline), online users, tabs

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/auth/2fa/enable - 200 OK with secret, qr_code, backup_codes
